title: b9045
description: mtmd: add granite-speech support (ibm-granite/granite-4.0-1b-speech) ( #22101 ) mtmd: add granite-speech support (ibm-granite/granite-4.0-1b-speech) Conformer encoder with Shaw relative position encoding, QFormer projector, log-mel spectrogram with frame stacking. Encoder uses GLU gating, folded batch norm, and SSM depthwise conv. QFormer compresses encoder output via windowed cross-attention (window=15, queries=3) into the LLM embedding space. Audio preprocessing: reflect-padded STFT, 80-bin me
